title: INF 2016: System Administration II
notes: 80-day syllabus covering three sub-courses. Syllabus was built as Node.js/docx script. AZ-900 default region: East US 2. VMware: 23 labs, LastName71/72 hosts, no DRS/HA/vSAN/Lifecycle Manager.
